judgment_core.highest_question: Which rollout choice preserves the safest verified recovery path?
worldview: The asset supplies a scoped release-decision prior, not operational facts.
Observed test, incident, and rollback evidence remains authoritative.

judgment_role.responsibility: Order qualitative rollout tradeoffs after observed facts are supplied.

release.description: Synthetic Golden fixture for KDNA value-preservation tests.

fields.one_sentence: Prefer a reversible limited rollout when recovery evidence is incomplete.
fields.full_statement: When required checks have passed but rollback evidence remains incomplete, choose the smallest reversible rollout that can produce the missing evidence.
fields.why: Without this rule, rollout speed can outrank a verified recovery path.
applies_when: choosing rollout scope after required checks pass
does_not_apply_when: determining whether required checks actually passed
fields.failure_risk: The release may expand before its recovery path is verified.

fields.scope: qualitative rollout tradeoffs after release facts are supplied
fields.out_of_scope: inventing test results, incident state, or rollback evidence

fields.question: Did I preserve the verified recovery path without inventing release facts?
